title: SG_SPEC_TOKEN hardening — dedicated PAT doc + CI preflight
intent: Stabilize CI-RED-001 auth fix: document dedicated PAT (not gh session token) and fail loud on dead token before pip install.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Add sg-spec git ls-remote preflight in api_verify; document dedicated PAT rotation; warn against gh auth token in configuration.md.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Probe 5 restored install with an expiring session token — needs stable secret shape and early CI failure before ambiguous pip errors.

files.intent: Preflight git ls-remote on sg-spec after credential setup.
verification: CI: Preflight sg-spec token + Install API deps green

files.intent: Authoritative PAT requirements and rotation steps.
Cross-link and anti-pattern for session OAuth token.
CI-RED-001 probe 5 note: replace session token with dedicated PAT.
